text_block_list.text:
Gold City should be heading out soon for today's
modeling gig. The two of us are chatting before
she leaves.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, can I sit on the bench for a minute? I'm still
listening to you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, kinda. I just need to rest while I can. My
manager'll get on my case if she sees me looking
light-headed.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But don't worry, I'll make it work. Sigh... I do low-key wanna skip, though...

It seems her exhaustion is beginning to catch up
with her. I suppose I should consider reevaluating
her race schedule.
